positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a crescent moon embraced by bioluminescent flowers and subtle constellations. The overall aesthetic should be clean line art mixed with modern flat design elements. Use a deep sapphire blue and indigo gradient background with accented strokes of soft electric teal, lavender, and warm gold. The flowers should have strong, symmetrical silhouettes, resembling mandalas. Composition must be centered and highly graphic, suitable for repeating on fabric. High contrast, deep saturation, perfect symmetry, vector graphic style, smooth gradient transitions, sticker quality, merchandise design.
negative: low resolution, grainy, artifacts, blur, text, watermarks, logos, signature, messy, photorealistic, deep shadows, bad anatomy, distorted, cropped, dirty
